ocr_mistral.text:
Bible record of Green Hill Norman, Sr.

# FAMILY RECORD.

|  DEATHS. | DEATHS.  |
| --- | --- |
|  Martha Elizabeth Norman
Died February the 1st 1903 in Searey County Arkansas | William M. Norman
Died October 27 1903 in Stone Co. Ark  |
|  Green H. Norman Son of G.H. & E.H. Norman
Departed this life Sept 15th 1872 in Searey County Ark | Albert Norman
Died April 20th 1910
Baxter Co  |
|  Henry Clay Norman died February the 15 1886 in Stone County Ark. | Thomas H. Norman
Died Feb 14, 1916 at Calico Rock Ark.
2 yard Co.  |
|  Eliza H. Norman
Wife of G.H. Norman
Deported this life August the 27 1901 in Baxter County Ark | M.A. Norman
Died June 15, 1929
Baxter Co. Ark  |
|  Green H. Norman
Died June 12 1903 Searey Co. Ark | Annah Norman wife of Mary died May 25 1930
Marion Co.  |
|   | John F. Norman died Sept 7, 1935  |
|   | F.M. Norman died April 18 1936  |

transcribe_handwriting.text:
Bible record of Green Hill Norman, Sr.

FAMILY RECORD.

 

DEATHS.                      DEATHS.

Martha Elizabeth Norman         William M Norman
Died February th 10th           died October 27th 1903
1870 in Searcy county           in Stone Co ark
Arkan[s]as
                               Albert Norman
Green M Norman son             Died April 20th 1910
of G.H. & E.H. Norman          Baxter Co
Departed this life Sept[ember] 
4th 1872 in Searcy county       Thomas H. Norman
Arkan[s]as                      Died Feb. 14, 1916 at
                                Calico Rock, Ark.
Nancy Clay Norman died         Izard Co.
 February the 15 - 1886 in
 Stone county Arkie[sas]       M. A. Norman
                                died Jan. 15, 1929
Collier W. Norman               Baxter Co ark
wife of G.H. Norman
Departed this life             Annah Norman wife of Mose
August the 29th 1901           died May 26th - 1930
in Baxter county Ark.          Marion Co.

Green H. Norman                John F. Norman died
Died June the 12               Sept 7, 1935
1902 Searcy Co.                
ark.                           F. M. Norman died
                               april 18 - 1936
blocks: Bible record of Green Hill Norman, Sr.
